docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 2090 BROADWAY ASSOCIATES
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2011 - JUDGMENT.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,400.00 FILED BY BIAGINI, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT 2090 BROADWAY ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT 2090 BROADWAY ASSOCIATES
